name: S-14 standards-add --dry-run reports the planned id without writing to the operator registry per §2.14 dry-run contract
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-add.sh" https://example.com/spec --id example-spec --dry-run 2>err.txt && [ ! -f .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml ] && grep -q 'dry-run' err.txt && grep -q 'id=example-spec' err.txt && echo skipped 1>&2
